page.title: Analytics
page.description: How is your application search going? Trends, conversion rates, and template performance at a glance.

applied.label: Applied
applied.tipHtml: How many of your created applications you actually sent. More applications = more chances.

interviewRate.label: Interview rate
interviewRate.tipHtml: Share of your sent applications that led to an interview invitation. Typical average: 15–25%.

accepted.label: Accepted
accepted.tipHtml: Applications that ended with a job offer.

ats.label: Ø ATS score
ats.tipHtml: How well applicant tracking systems (ATS) can read your resumes — 0 to 100. Goal: 80+.

upgrade.title: Advanced Analytics & Trends
upgrade.description: Success rates, conversion funnel, ATS score trends, and template performance — exclusive to Premium members.

activity.title: Activity
activity.tipHtml: Daily application activity. Toggle metrics via chips; hover over the chart for exact values.
activity.description: Created and sent applications per day · last {count} days

funnel.title: Conversion funnel
funnel.tipHtml: Each stage shows how many applications made it this far. The percentage is the pass-through rate from the previous stage. Click a stage to open filtered applications.
funnel.description: How many applications make it to a job offer.
funnel.opensStatus: Opens {count} {count, plural, one {application} other {applications}} with status “{status}”.
funnel.clickStage: Click a stage to open the related applications.

insight.new: Good start — {applications} applications created, {applied} sent. Create a few more so meaningful trends can emerge.
insight.establishedAboveAverage: Your interview rate is {rate}% — above average.
insight.tip: Tip: A higher ATS score noticeably lowers drop-off.

scoreBuckets.title: ATS score & interviews
scoreBuckets.tipHtml: We group your sent applications by ATS score and show the interview rate per group. Goal: as many applications as possible in the green range (80+).
scoreBuckets.description: Which score ranges most often lead to interviews.
scoreBuckets.empty: Once you create applications with an ATS score, we will show which score ranges bring the most interviews here.
scoreBuckets.best: Applications with {bucket} points achieve the highest interview rate ({rate}%).

topTemplates.title: Top templates
topTemplates.description: Which resume templates you use most often — and how they perform.
topTemplates.empty: No template data available yet. Create applications with different templates to compare their performance.
